data.body: DECISION (per maintainer): ADOPT as reference tooling, not delete. These live-Jira e2e probes were used to harden/validate Jira sync and are useful for pressure-testing future Jira changes. Relocated src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/{e2e_validation_probe,e2e_field_validation_probe}.sh -> scripts/jira-pressure-test/ (outside the wheel's packages=[src/rebar] and outside pytest testpaths, so never shipped and never run by the suite). Relabeled headers as REFERENCE/MANUAL pressure-test tooling, removed stale reconcile-bridge.yml (deleted workflow) usage lines, repointed engine/CLI path derivation at $REPO_ROOT/src/rebar/_engine so they stay runnable, and added scripts/jira-pressure-test/README.md.
